title: Lanterns Under Blackwood Hill
summary: A lantern-lit starter adventure about route marks, quiet helpers, and a hill that remembers doors.

quests.title: Learn why the hill doors remember

scenes.title: Porch Threshold
scenes.reward: The rail-mark points left, not toward the road.
scenes.text: Rain beads along the old porch rail. Beneath the peeling paint, a route mark waits like someone scratched it there with shaking hands.

scenes.title: Left Trail
scenes.reward: The soft trail bends toward a helper sign hung low in the trees.
scenes.text: The trail leans away from the porch as if it remembers leaving. Wet roots shine through the mud, and the woods pause between drops of rain.

scenes.title: Name Gate
scenes.reward: The gate opens for kindness before it opens for certainty.
scenes.text: A narrow gate waits between two bent posts. Its latch is cold, but the wood around it is warm where many hands have hesitated.

scenes.title: Rain Library
scenes.reward: The wet ledger remembers who crossed the hill and who turned back.
scenes.text: Shelves of damp paper breathe in the dark. Every page smells like rainwater, candle smoke, and names that were nearly forgotten.

scenes.title: Candle Market
scenes.reward: A blue map shows the safe way home through the hill market.
scenes.text: Blue candles burn in crooked rows. Their flames lean toward a map only visible when you stop trying to own the light.

npcs.title: Old Joss
npcs.clue: Old Joss says, 'A trail worth finding rarely starts where folks expect. Watch what the porch is pointing away from.'

npcs.title: Mara Lanternwright
npcs.clue: Mara says, 'If a place lies to you, check what it repeats. The helper sign repeats left, left, left.'

npcs.title: Nix Understep
npcs.clue: Nix whispers, 'Memory-doors do not open to force. They open when you give them the name they lost.'

rewards.title: Rest Token
rewards.text: A warm token settles in your palm. It smells faintly of tea and gives you enough breath to continue.
rewards.clue: Rest is also a kind of route.

rewards.title: Blue Thread
rewards.text: A blue thread catches on your sleeve, tugging once toward the key route before going still.
rewards.clue: Blue thread points toward the missing porch key.

rewards.title: Porch Coin
rewards.text: You find a porch coin tucked where rain cannot reach it. One side shows a lantern. The other shows an open door.
rewards.clue: The coin is a promise: the porch remembers return paths.

edges.label: speak kindly and enter the rain library
carry the wet ledger to the candle market
follow the blue map home
edges.condition: when the candles lean toward return
